---
title: ""
---

```{=html}
<!-- ============================================
     ABOUT PAGE — about.qmd
     Uses: .about-page styles added to styles.css
     Images needed: images/snoopy-balloon.png
                    images/snoopy-teacher.png
     ============================================ -->




  ☁️  ☁️

  About ☁️

  
    
    

      
        Hey, Hi, Hello! Thanks for visiting my page, where I take you through my experiences in
        ISSS608 Visual Analytics and Applications, a small part of my Masters of IT in Business journey in         SMU.
      
        Hope that your time in this course is as exciting as mine was! ☁️
      
      
      
        SMU MITB
        Visual Analytics
        ISSS608
        R & Quarto
      
    

    
    
  

  
  
  Check out my other adventures... 🐾


```
